name: Eddie & Steve
description:
When you return to Hawkins after three years away, your best friend Robin is eager to introduce you to her new group of friends, and what better way to do that than to bring you to the get together at Steve's cabin! But what starts as a simple welcome-back party at Steve Harrington's cabin quickly becomes complicated when both Steve Harrington and Eddie Munson find themselves drawn to you (but let's be honest, that ain't no problem😏)

No Content Warnings: I just wanted two of my fictional crushes to fight over me is that so much to ask ? (don't worry they won't fight for long. I'll teach them the power of sharing.)
creator: itsTalbby
